overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from God of War showing Kratos walking through a vast snowy mountain valley dominated by massive skeletal bone arches. The character approaches and enters a dark cave entrance, transitioning into a narrow rocky passage with ancient ruins visible in the distance. The footage features high-fidelity snow physics and dramatic lighting transitions.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy valley with giant skeletal remains

agents.ego_description: Kratos walking steadily through deep snow toward a distant cave entrance, passing between massive bone arches

entered.detail: massive curved rib bone structure covered in snow, forming an arch on the left side of the valley
massive curved rib bone structure covered in snow, forming an arch on the right side of the valley
expansive snow-covered ground with visible footprints and texture
tall rocky cliff face with snow patches forming the left boundary of the valley
tall rocky cliff face with snow patches forming the right boundary of the valley
dark stone archway entrance to a cave visible in the distance between the cliffs

segments.scene_description: Kratos walks through a wide snowy valley dominated by massive skeletal bone arches. The bright midday sun casts sharp shadows on the snow as he approaches a dark cave entrance in the distance between rocky cliffs. The environment is vast, open, and completely devoid of other life.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching dark cave entrance with icicles

events.description: entering the shadow cast by the cave entrance, ambient light drops significantly as the sun is blocked
moving from open exterior valley into the enclosed cave tunnel

agents.ego_description: Kratos approaching the dark cave mouth, moving from bright snow into the shadowy interior while passing under hanging icicles

entered.detail: clusters of icicles hanging from the top of the cave entrance archway

segments.scene_description: As Kratos approaches the cave, the massive bone arches fall behind him. He enters the shadow of the stone archway adorned with icicles, the lighting dimming dramatically as he transitions from the bright exterior into the darker cave interior. The space becomes more enclosed as the walls close in.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow snow-covered canyon passage with ancient ruins ahead

events.description: ancient stone temple ruins become visible in the distance at the end of the narrow passage

agents.ego_description: Kratos navigating the narrow rocky passage, snow crunching underfoot as he heads toward the distant ancient ruins

entered.detail: stone ruins of an ancient structure visible through the narrow passage ahead, partially covered in snow
large rocks and boulders piled along the left side of the passage, covered in snow

segments.scene_description: Inside the narrow cave passage, the walls close in around Kratos. The cave mouth disappears behind him as ancient stone ruins come into view ahead at the end of the tunnel. The environment is significantly darker and more confined than the open valley, with snow continuing to cover the rocky ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vast, sunlit snowy valley into the oppressive confinement of a dark mountain cave. It begins with Kratos walking through an open expanse dominated by massive skeletal bone arches under a bright midday sun. As he advances, the bone arches recede into the distance and the lighting dims dramatically as he passes beneath a stone archway adorned with icicles. The scene then shifts from the bright exterior into a narrow cave passage where the walls close in and the open sky disappears. Finally, the environment becomes significantly darker and more confined, leading the camera through the snowy tunnel toward ancient stone ruins visible in the distance.
